data.title: LIGIANT 24V Ride on Toys for Big Kids, 4-Seater Kids' Car, Golf Cart Max. Capacity: 264 Lbs(4 Kids), 4WD Ride on Car w/Remote

features: Spacious with 4-Seats Design: Designed with a spacious 4-seat layout
it’s ideal for larger families. All 4-seats are equipped with seat belts
and the 2 rear seats feature footrests
providing a comfortable ride for siblings or friends. Dimensions: 51.4 x 28.3 x 45.1 inches.
Safety is Priority: The remote control design gives parents peace of mind
while kids can also drive using the foot pedal for a hands-on experience. With 4 seat belts
2 rear anti-roll wheels and spring suspension
it provides extra stability and protection on any terrain
ensuring a smooth and safe ride.
High Performance: Our 4WD kids' golf cart is equipped with a powerful 24V 7AH battery
providing ample power. It offers two speed options ranging from 1.86 to 4.35 mph
making it perfect for children aged 3-8. It’s the ideal companion for your child's adventures.
Spark Joyful Adventures: Multimedia features add unique fun to this 4-seater toddler golf cart. Enjoy music
stories
and radio via Bluetooth or USB
while the built-in speakers and volume control knob enhance the interactive experience. The battery display screen keeps you informed of the battery level
ensuring timely charging so your kids can have endless fun!
1:1 Replica of a Real Golf Cart: Detachable Awning
a 1:1 replica of a real golf cart
with an appearance that mirrors an actual golf cart. Let kids experience the thrill of driving on the grass just like adults.
Tips: The maximum weight capacity of this product is 264 lbs
which refers to the total weight when four children are riding simultaneously. The width of each seat is 9.5 inches. Please consider your child's height before purchasing.
